name: OCU P1 Capture
description: Validates the capture engine: factory, web/linux/android/androidtv sources, stress behaviour.

metadata._llm_driven_reason: Vision-driven test suite per HelixQA Constitution §1 (Fully Autonomous LLM-Driven QA): prose actions are interpreted by the vision model. Article XI §11.5 exemption.
metadata.author: vasic-digital

test_cases.name: factory-register-and-open
test_cases.expected_result: Custom factory registered under a test kind is discoverable via Kinds() and Open() returns a non-nil CaptureSource

test_cases.name: factory-unknown-kind-errors

steps.name: Run factory unknown kind error case

test_cases.expected_result: Open() returns a non-nil error containing the unregistered kind name

test_cases.name: factory-concurrent-register-race

steps.name: Run factory concurrent register race check

test_cases.expected_result: Concurrent Register() and Open() calls on the factory produce no data races under -race

test_cases.name: web-source-produces-frames

steps.name: Run web source mock frame production

test_cases.expected_result: Web source with mock producer emits 3 frames with correct Seq, Width, and PixelFormat

test_cases.name: web-source-factory-registration

steps.name: Run web source factory registration check

test_cases.expected_result: capture.Kinds() contains "web" after the web sub-package init() runs

test_cases.name: web-production-not-wired

steps.name: Run web source production ErrNotWired check

test_cases.expected_result: Open() with the real productionFrameProducer returns ErrNotWired and no CaptureSource

test_cases.name: web-stress-100-clients

steps.name: Run 100-goroutine concurrent web source stress test under -race

test_cases.expected_result: Zero errors and zero data races across 100 concurrent Open→Start→read-3-frames→Stop→Close cycles

test_cases.name: linux-source-produces-frames

steps.name: Run linux source mock frame production

test_cases.expected_result: Linux X11 source with mock producer emits 3 frames with correct Seq, Width, and PixelFormat

test_cases.name: linux-source-factory-registration

steps.name: Run linux source factory registration check

test_cases.expected_result: capture.Kinds() contains "linux-x11" after the linux sub-package init() runs

test_cases.name: linux-production-not-wired

steps.name: Run linux source production ErrNotWired check

test_cases.expected_result: Open() with the real productionFrameProducer returns ErrNotWired and no CaptureSource

test_cases.name: linux-stress-100-clients

steps.name: Run 100-goroutine concurrent linux source stress test under -race

test_cases.expected_result: Zero errors and zero data races across 100 concurrent Open→Start→read-3-frames→Stop→Close cycles

test_cases.name: android-source-produces-h264

steps.name: Run android source H264 frame production

test_cases.expected_result: Android source with mock producer emits 3 H264-format frames with correct NAL unit header bytes

test_cases.name: android-factory-registers-both-kinds

steps.name: Run android factory both-kinds registration check

test_cases.expected_result: capture.Kinds() contains both "android" and "androidtv" after the android sub-package init() runs

test_cases.name: android-source-reports-kind

steps.name: Run android source Name() kind reporting check

test_cases.expected_result: Source opened via 'android' kind returns Name()="android"; via 'androidtv' returns Name()="androidtv"

test_cases.name: android-production-not-wired

steps.name: Run android source production ErrNotWired check

test_cases.expected_result: Start() with the real productionFrameProducer returns ErrNotWired (Open succeeds; Start is where android checks)

test_cases.name: android-stress-100-clients

steps.name: Run 100-goroutine concurrent android source stress test under -race

test_cases.expected_result: Zero errors and zero data races across 100 concurrent Open→Start→read-3-frames→Stop→Close cycles
